title: AI Blocks
description: scratch for ai engineering, built in under 6 hours; 505 adaptive blocks in a graph db dag let you vibecode for 80% fewer tokens than opus 4.6, and import existing code or any github repo into the editor. open source.

title: situational-intelligence
description: browser-based emergency monitoring (aegis) that fuses live camera frames, frame-differencing motion intensity, whisper speech, geolocation and claude vision to detect threats, escalate with voice/gesture confirmation, and simulate dispatch on a responder map.

title: fax
description: blockchain-anchored protocol where autonomous agents discover, negotiate, and atomically swap compute, tokens and knowledge via hash-locked escrow. off-chain websocket traffic, on-chain anchors in solidity, rust core, five security levels up to zero-knowledge trades.

title: DEF
description: drop-in rl layer for any web game that tunes difficulty, speed and rewards in real time using webcam rppg vitals and attention-weighted thompson sampling / ucb1 bandits. boosted engagement 29-38% across three test games without touching game code.

title: Minecraft Circuits
description: node.js library that compiles verilog (via yosys) or raw netlists into buildable redstone block layouts with relative positioning, so an llm can emit a hardware spec and get a minecraft circuit out the other end.

title: Cyphe
description: infinite doomscroll knowledge agent built in an 8-hour hackathon sprint; weaves llm content with wikipedia, twitter, reddit and memes into a horizonless encyclopedia feed while tracking engagement.

title: Shoulders
description: security layer for ai agents that runs parallel embedding, behavioral, contextual and anomaly detectors to catch prompt injection, goal hijacking and code injection at 89-96% detection, 0.8% false positives and 34ms median latency; auto-reroutes compromised agents and scales via redis.

title: Trace
description: 24/7 retail procurement agent that turns user requests into webshop searches, pays by card or crypto, forecasts demand with holt smoothing, and schedules agentic restocks behind a transparent approval flow and live inventory dashboard.

title: Excalidraw AI
description: web app that generates and edits flowcharts from natural language prompts and exports native .excalidraw files you can keep editing on the canvas.

title: Reforest NYC
description: geospatial platform for urban reforestation in nyc with interactive mapping, environmental simulation and impact forecasting, built for the columbia leap x nvidia hackathon.

title: Robot Deformables
description: multi-modal rl for robot handovers of deformable objects: transformer fuses vision, proprioception and audio, diffusion policy pretrained on 125k+ expert frames (0.027 val mse) then fine-tuned with ppo. writeup documents reward-engineering pain at 3% task success.

title: Really Cheap Flight Finder
description: graph-based flight search that chains nearby airports, split tickets, hidden-city routes and award calcs over serpapi google flights data, curating 15-35 deals in 3-5 seconds while capping api calls at 7-15 per search for ~91-95% cost savings.

title: Osler
description: rag-based hospitalist onboarding app with guidelines, scheduling and admin tools using gemini (3rd place ruhealthhack).

title: Aura
description: autonomous retail analytics agent: gemini 2.5 flash lite drafts multi-step investigation plans, translates nl to sql against snowflake and synthesizes findings in 10-30s behind a react chat + kpi dashboard. agentic rag over raw retrieval.

title: Mesh
description: turns docs, threads, meetings and whiteboards into a dynamic knowledge graph you can semantically query across teams (1st place rutgers x fiserv). adopted by academic and research groups.

title: Vault
description: distributed, offline-first os for devs with encrypted team messaging, aes-256, rbac and audit logging for compliance use.

title: Contextualized-Multi-Modal-RAG-Feedback-Loop
description: multi-modal rag that returns relevant images alongside answers, with a personalization engine that learns from user patterns and a self-healing feedback loop that targets hallucinations via context-aware reranking.

title: BATMAN: Protect your City
description: community safety app on react/node/mongo where residents report crimes, suspicious activity and accidents with geolocation, view a live hotspot map, and get vonage/twilio sms alerts plus emergency resource links wired to local law enforcement.

title: GIST
description: streamlit + flask web app that pulls stars, collaborators and commit histories off the github api, visualizes them, and wraps a gpt-backed chatbox so you can ask questions about any repo.

title: PLANA
description: business plan analyzer that grades executive summaries with bert sentiment, market clustering, financial forecasting and fraud detection. flask + postgres + docker stack with ner and text classification under the hood.

title: GPT 3.5 4 Devs
description: open-source streamlit chat app that augments gpt-3.5 with google search, wikipedia, web browsing, youtube transcripts and file ops so one chat interface can scrape, look up, and manage docs.

title: Helios
description: wearable closed-circuit aid for the visually impaired that recognizes objects with cv, guides the wearer via wrist-mounted haptic buzzers, and speaks descriptions aloud in real time.

title: ARGlasses
description: arkit ios app built in a weekend that lets users try on different pairs of glasses from home via face tracking and 3d rendering. hackathon submission with public demo and code.

title: Cone
description: php + mysql app that consolidates social profiles, contact info and external links into a single qr code and shareable link, with login/signup and qrcode.js for generation.

title: Inexpensive Enhanced One Factor Authentication
description: logistic regression model that scores login attempts across 14 behavioral and technical signals (device, ip reputation, geo shifts) to flag malicious logins without requiring mfa.

title: ELO Algorithm Based NFL Predictor
description: adapts the chess elo ranking system to the nfl, pulling historical matchups via nflgame and friends to compute dynamic team ratings and predict game outcomes from competitive strength.

title: Congress Connect
description: ios/android app that scrapes congressional tweets on a user's policy keywords, runs an lstm sentiment classifier (95.43% accuracy) and synthesizes a stance statement per representative. react frontend, python ml backend.

title: Around-The-Pipe Audio Based Water Tracker for Home Residents
description: published research on supervised ml over pipe audio signals for non-invasive real-time water flow measurement in residential plumbing.

title: CourseTurtle
description: php + mysql platform for students and teachers to analyze, compare and share course schedules with data visualizations.

title: QuickEstimate
description: ios app that uses core ml + vision to scan household items and generate insurance pricing estimates on the spot (3rd place 2021 congressional app challenge, nj-7; live demoed to rep. tom malinowski).

title: WHRHS New Tab Extension
description: chrome extension deployed to 2000+ student chromebooks that replaces the new tab page with a school-custom dashboard.

title: The Power of Artificial Intelligence
description: tedx talk on real-world applications and the trajectory of artificial intelligence.

title: Virtual Note
description: html-based music composition tool pairing a virtual piano with a note writer and mp3 playback for intuitive browser composition (3rd place 2019 repl.it jam, music category).

title: Business Meeting Summarizer
description: pipeline that takes meeting audio, transcribes it with speech-to-text and returns an extractive summary so notes write themselves.

title: Insem Camera Foot Traffic Counter
description: scrapes public security camera directories and runs yolo person detection on each frame to count and track foot traffic across many live streams at once.
